response:
this holy **gene** of **language** carries the **spirit** within every **visit** to the divine path-where truth meets the soul through grace-**without** the guru devotion cannot exist-**so** the mind becomes pure and clear.

***

the family ties fade away when one serves the perfect teacher-**for** only then does the **spirit** find true rest-**every** **visit** to the holy word reveals the **gene** of eternal love-**thus** the **language** of the heart speaks without fear.
